title: assessment.coding config
description: Per-scope (platform/org/exam/question) configuration for the coding assessment plugin. Lower scopes can further restrict but cannot widen what an upper scope allows.

allowedLanguages.description: Plugin slugs (language.python, language.java, …) permitted at this scope. Omit to inherit from the parent scope.

allowQuestionOverride.description: Whether a question may further restrict allowedLanguages below the exam-section setting.

actions.description: Per-action toggles. Disabling an action removes the corresponding candidate button.
